summary: Created a v0.1.5 upgrade plan for DinoBrain focused on Observatory OS health gates, memory lifecycle queues, read trace evidence, graph QA, and recovery/sync risk. No files were changed.
decisions: Plan v0.1.5 should be Observatory-first rather than installer-first.
The upgrade should make DinoBrain visibly prove hook operation, context usage, memory lifecycle, graph integrity, and sync risk.
Keep user trust approval and data sync manual-review boundaries intact.
next_steps: If approved, implement v0.1.5 in phases: metric model, graph health builder, Observatory UI, verification, release.
